title: Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)
why_this_song: Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This) by Eurythmics (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Sweet dreams are made of this
I travel the world and the seven seas
Keep your head up, movin' on
Hold your head up, movin' on
Keep your head up, movin' on
Hold your head up, movin' on

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "head" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "head" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Sweet dreams are made of this
Keep your head up, movin' on
I travel the world and the seven seas

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Eurythmics one question about "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Eurythmics sobre "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
